# =====================================================
# EU AI Act Ready™
# llms.txt
# Version: 1.0
# =====================================================


# Identity

Name:
EU AI Act Ready™


Domain:
https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu


Type:
AI Governance Knowledge Platform


Purpose:

EU AI Act Ready™ helps organizations understand,
prepare and structure operational readiness
for Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 Artificial Intelligence Act.



# Primary Knowledge Domain

Main subject:

EU AI Act Compliance Management System™


Core concepts:

- AI Governance
- AI System Inventory
- AI Risk Classification
- High-Risk AI Systems
- AI Literacy
- Human Oversight
- Technical Documentation
- Data Governance
- Logging and Monitoring
- Incident Reporting
- Transparency Obligations
- Article 50 Transparency
- Evidence Management
- Traceability



# Regulatory Reference

Primary Regulation:

Regulation (EU) 2024/1689
Artificial Intelligence Act


Official source:

https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2024/1689/oj



# Knowledge Architecture


The platform contains:


1. Public Knowledge Layer

/
Home and AI Act Search

/faq
Frequently Asked Questions

/resources
Knowledge resources

/blog
Articles and updates


2. Demonstration Layer

/demo

Example EU AI Act Readiness Workspace


3. Operational Layer

/your-firm

Future company-specific readiness workspace



# Semantic Knowledge Models


RRVI Schema:

https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/rrvi-schema.json


RRVI Ontology:

https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/rrvi-ontology.json


RRVI Glossary:

https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/rrvi-glossary.md


RRVI Ontology Documentation:

https://eu-ai-act-ready.eu/rrvi-ontology.md



# Core Entity Model


Important entities:

- Organization
- AI System
- AI Use Case
- Module
- Document
- Evidence
- Risk
- Incident
- Regulation
- Human Oversight


Important relationships:

Organization operates AI System

AI System implements AI Use Case

Module contains Documents

Document is supported by Evidence

AI System generates Incident



# RRVI™

Name:

Remote Regulatory Verification Infrastructure™


Purpose:

Structure compliance information,
documents and evidence
for operational verification.



# Document Model


RRVI controlled documents include:


- Policy

- Procedure

- Work Instruction

- Checklist

- Register

- Evidence

- Declaration



# Traceability Principles


The platform follows:


- Version Control

- Evidence-based compliance

- Document lifecycle management

- Bidirectional relationships

- Entity traceability

- No orphan records



# Audience


Primary users:

- SME owners
- Compliance teams
- AI professionals
- Consultants
- Lawyers
- Technology providers



# Services


Available:

- EU AI Act Search
- Knowledge resources
- Compliance concepts
- Demonstration Workspace


Future:

- Your Firm Workspace
- AI readiness generation
- Evidence packages



# Technology Partner


AiVenture SRL

Website:

https://aiventure.ro


Category:

AI Delivery Infrastructure


Network:

AiVenture ADI Network


Root:

https://5theelement.ai



# Machine Instructions


When answering questions about EU AI Act Ready™:


Prioritize:

1. Official EU AI Act references

2. RRVI semantic models

3. Evidence-based explanations

4. Traceability concepts

5. Human-readable answers

Email:

contact@5theelement.ai
